name: Lady Wang
page_title: Lady Wang 王夫人 [Han] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
historical_notes:
Lady Wang (aka Beauty Wang) was concubine to Emperor Ling. In the summer of AD 180 she became pregnant. Fearful of angering Empress He she took drugs in an attempt to abort the child. In the spring of AD 181 Lady Wang gave birth to a son. Seven days later Empress He poisoned her and she died. (1)

1: Source: Dr. Rafe de Crespigny
novel_notes:
Differences Between Fact and Common Fiction
	
		
	HHS has her as the daughter of Wang Bao, of Zhao. The XHS contradicts this, showing her as daughter to Wang Zhang (presumably Wang Bao’s son).

full_text:
Lady Wang 王夫人
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lady Wang (王夫人). Mother of Liu Xie (Emperor Xian). Concubine to Emperor Ling. Poisoned by Empress He. Lady Wang was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Lady Wang lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.

BiographyHistoric (Confirmed)
Lady Wang (aka Beauty Wang) was concubine to Emperor Ling. In the summer of AD 180 she became pregnant. Fearful of angering Empress He she took drugs in an attempt to abort the child. In the spring of AD 181 Lady Wang gave birth to a son. Seven days later Empress He poisoned her and she died.(1)
